title: Origin Realms - Unique Dark
description: Custom Server-side GUI Support for the Origin Realms Server Pack in the Unique Dark theme
body:
![ORxUD_Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56f43aa2adf75db6061aaf457bf8347c2d37599d.png)

 This resource pack aims to add the Unique Dark theme to the custom GUI of the Origin Realms Server. While it isnt a 1:1 copy of the original Unique Dark theme, it is close enough. The pack aims to create a minimalist style to the existing Origin Realms GUI without sacrificing functionality.


![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab78b757f5af2592fbb3291501c02a5c9b01b74a.png)

Make sure you use **[ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker)** to allow this resource pack to overide the servers existing pack otherwise you wont be able to see any change.
Also make sure you have the [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) resource pack installed alongside this if you want the full experience.

![Mod Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cff88259801aa986682a279583b51fc3d8d99eb.png)

This Resource Pack was made to also be compatible with the following Mods:

- [OriginsEnhanced (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-enhanced)
- [OriginAddons (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/originaddons)
- [OR Stash (Discord)](https://discord.gg/sxdpqgtZKk)

![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/132769337b31015ca3c3f59090d603d93a18ea49.png)

This mod would not be possible without [RobotPants](https://modrinth.com/user/RobotPants) for allowing me to use the Server Pack as a structure for the Resource Pack.
Aditionally, credit should go to [AmongstReality](https://modrinth.com/user/AmongstReality) as this pack was **heavily** inspired by their work with Unique Dark.
FYI: This pack does not infringe on the usage rights of the Unique Dark Pack as stated in their Licence; this pack falls under mod compatibility, server compatibility and in no way is being profited off, if you would like to edit or redistribute this pack see the licence.txt and credits.txt within the pack file for more info.
